creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: If /usr/local/include/iconv.h exists on the host then the output of 'make -C /usr/ports/print/cups -V CFLAGS' should contain '-DLIBICONV_PLUG'.  The is flag is added in /usr/ports/Mk/Uses/iconv.mk.  You'll have to figure out why that isn't working.  Did you make any modifications to the ports tree?  Is there anything special in /etc/make.conf?
